meta.title: Doctore.ar - Medical Appointment System
meta.description: Comprehensive platform for medical appointment management. Simplify your practice administration.

hero.title: We transform your medical practice management
hero.description: Comprehensive medical appointment system that simplifies administration, improves patient experience, and optimizes your time.

turnos.title: TurnosMedicos
turnos.subtitle: The path to efficient appointment management starts here. Discover how we simplify every step of the process.
turnos.step_1_desc: Advanced calendar system with availability management, time blocks, and custom settings for each professional.
turnos.step_2_desc: Your patients can book appointments anytime from any device. No calls, no waiting.
turnos.step_3_desc: Email, SMS, and WhatsApp notifications that reduce no-shows by up to 70%. Automatic confirmations.
turnos.step_4_desc: Complete dashboard with real-time statistics, detailed reports, and analytics tools for your practice.

services.title: Services that Drive Your Practice
services.subtitle: Every feature designed to optimize your time and improve your patients' experience.
services.service_1_desc: Digital medical records, patient files, and complete follow-up. Everything centralized and accessible.
services.service_2_desc: Generate invoices, manage payments, and keep financial control of your practice without complications.
services.service_3_desc: Integrated video consultations with virtual waiting room, session recording, and digital prescriptions.
services.service_4_desc: Connect with insurance providers, laboratories, and external systems. Open API for developers.

pricing.title: Plans that Fit Your Needs
pricing.subtitle: Choose the perfect plan for your practice. No hidden costs, no surprises.

about.title: Born to Simplify Healthcare
about.description_1: Doctore.ar was born from a real need: healthcare professionals overwhelmed by the administrative management of their practices.
about.description_2: Our team combines experience in technology and healthcare to create tools that truly make a difference in the daily lives of doctors and patients.

contact.title: Let's Talk About Your Project
contact.description: We're here to help you transform your practice management. Contact us and we'll respond within 24 hours.
contact.form_message_placeholder: Tell us about your practice and what you need...

footer.description: Comprehensive management platform for medical practices. Simplifying digital health.
